creator: LG CNS; Anthropic

evidence.text: The file-mediated approach began as a workaround. Before the 1M-token context window and memory features arrived, preventing quality degradation as context accumulated was the team's hardest engineering problem. The patterns LG CNS designed to solve it, persistent file-based memory and multi-agent coordination through file handoffs, anticipated capabilities Anthropic later shipped natively.

provenance: Public first-party customer case page; bounded source evidence retained.
relevance_evidence: The customer case documents evaluation, persistent organizational memory, deterministic quality measurement, and a harness that improves over time.
rights_note: Only a bounded publisher-authored excerpt is retained.
title: LG CNS builds a self-improving modernization harness with Claude Code
